📋 GetMethods

Open end-points.js

Open Api/routes/end-oints.js. Now you'll see two new commands in the VS Code Title Bar: getMethod and postMethod.

getMethod (UI view)

click getMethod to open the interactive UI screen. Select your get methods and select one (e.g., ShowAll,find,lastRecord,firstRecord), then click one.
